case.title: Costco Wholesale Corp. v. Omega, S. A.

opinion.p: 562 U. S. ____ (2010) 562 U. S. ____ (2010) 562 U. S. ____ (2010) SUPREME COURT OF THE UNITED STATES NO. 08-1423 COSTCO WHOLESALE CORPORATION, PETITIONER v. OMEGA, S. A.
on writ of certiorari to the united states court of appeals for the ninth circuit
The judgment is affirmed by an equally divided Court.
Justice Kagan took no part in the consideration or decision of this case.
